abbreviatedDecimalPlacesDescription: Set how many decimal places abbreviated DPS/HPS/TPS values keep in player and skill tables
autoClearOnSceneChangeDescription: Automatically save and clear the current meter when the game changes scene or server. Turn this off to keep the current meter running across scene changes.
autoHideLiveWindowDescription: Hide the live meter after the delay when no new damage is detected, then show it automatically as soon as damage appears.
autoHideLiveWindowDelaySecondsDescriptio: Seconds to wait after no new damage is detected before hiding the live meter. Set to 0 to hide immediately.
defaultTargetDummyDescription: The header target-dummy button will use this default target directly
refreshRateDescription: Refresh interval for live statistics (50–2000ms). Lower is smoother, but uses more CPU.
relativeToTopDPSPlayerDescription: Scale color bars relative to the top DPS player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
relativeToTopDPSSkillDescription: Scale color bars relative to the top DPS skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
relativeToTopHealPlayerDescription: Scale color bars relative to the top heal player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
relativeToTopHealSkillDescription: Scale color bars relative to the top heal skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
relativeToTopTankedPlayerDescription: Scale color bars relative to the top tanked player instead of all players. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
relativeToTopTankedSkillDescription: Scale color bars relative to the top tanked skill instead of all skills. Useful for 20-player groups or world bosses.
reorderColumnsHint: Use the arrows to reorder; use the switches to show or hide columns.
shortenAbilityScoreDescription: Display ability score in abbreviated form
showHeaderTargetDummyButtonDescription: Show the Target Dummy Mode toggle and status in the live window header.
showOthersName.option.name: Show Others' Name
showOthersNameDescription: "Show Others' Class" replaces others' names with their class; "Name - Class/Spec" shows both.
showYourName.option.name: Show Your Name
showYourNameDescription: "Show Your Class" replaces your name with your class; "Name - Class/Spec" shows both.
